scripts.build:tailwind: npm run build:tilewindscss && tailwindcss -i ./web/tailwind/input.css -o ./web/css/tailwind.css && node scripts/emit-tailwind-min-alias.cjs && node scripts/minify-checkout.cjs && node scripts/copy-tailwind-to-pub.cjs
scripts.build:tailwind:opt: npm run build:tilewindscss -- --minify && tailwindcss -i ./web/tailwind/input.css -o ./web/css/tailwind.css && node scripts/emit-tailwind-min-alias.cjs && node scripts/minify-checkout.cjs && node scripts/copy-tailwind-to-pub.cjs
scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker run --rm --network host -v "$PWD":/w -w /w -e SKIP_E2E_MAGENTO_USER=1 -e PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://app.luma.test} -e E2E_SEARCH_QUERY=${E2E_SEARCH_QUERY:-} -e E2E_PRODUCT_PATH=${E2E_PRODUCT_PATH:-} -e E2E_CATEGORY_PATH=${E2E_CATEGORY_PATH:-} mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.49.0-jammy bash -lc 'npm ci && npx playwright install chromium && npm run test:e2e'
